text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
WOW! What an epiphany! Sometimes<n>I scare
myself with how smart I am!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Combining daily cleaning with<n>training... This is
killing two birds with<n>one stone AT ITS FINEST!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Now I just need to think about how to<n>do it!
Hmmm, how can I clean in a way<n>that'll boost
my Bakushin?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hm? Hey, you! Do you have any<n>suggestions?
choice_data_list: Boost your speed by wiping the floor!
Boost your power by tidying the reference room!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Speed?! You mean wiping the floor<n>will lead me
to even greater Bakushin<n>speed?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: What a fantastic idea! I'll get on that<n>right away!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ohh! So if I Bakushin while I tidy stuff,<n>it'll lead
me to having an even more<n>powerful Bakushin?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Raaaah! Leave it to me! Making<n>things nice and
tidy is a piece of cake<n>for a genius like me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A series of truly frightening noises<n>follows in
Sakura Bakushin O's wake,<n>but at least it looks
like her problem's<n>solved now.
